title: `$isunknown` in an implication doesn't compile under coverage.
body:
Test case here: https://github.com/verilator/verilator/commit/cab1765a68be7ff5323c439d99adda2b14343782
which produces
```
%Error: Internal Error: t/t_assert_implication_coverage.v:42:63: ../V3Broken.cpp:183: Broken link in node (or something without maybePointedTo): 'm_varp && !m_varp->brokeExists()' @ ./V3Ast__gen_impl.h:6096
                                                               : ... note: In instance 't.test'
   42 |         @(posedge clk) enable_invalid_data_checks & valid |-> !$isunknown(data);
      |                                                               ^
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html?v=5.043 for more assistance.
%Warning: vlt/t_assert_implication_coverage: Exec of verilator failed: %Error: Internal Error: t/t_assert_implication_coverage.v:42:63: ../V3Broken.cpp:183: Broken link in node (or something without maybePointedTo): 'm_varp && !m_varp->brokeExists()' @ ./V3Ast__gen_impl.h:6096
```

We've also seen this produce
```
Unsupported: Write to variable in sampled expression
```
even though there was no variable being written in the implication
code_blocks:
%Error: Internal Error: t/t_assert_implication_coverage.v:42:63: ../V3Broken.cpp:183: Broken link in node (or something without maybePointedTo): 'm_varp && !m_varp->brokeExists()' @ ./V3Ast__gen_impl.h:6096
                                                               : ... note: In instance 't.test'
   42 |         @(posedge clk) enable_invalid_data_checks & valid |-> !$isunknown(data);
      |                                                               ^
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html?v=5.043 for more assistance.
%Warning: vlt/t_assert_implication_coverage: Exec of verilator failed: %Error: Internal Error: t/t_assert_implication_coverage.v:42:63: ../V3Broken.cpp:183: Broken link in node (or something without maybePointedTo): 'm_varp && !m_varp->brokeExists()' @ ./V3Ast__gen_impl.h:6096
Unsupported: Write to variable in sampled expression
